_comment: Container-relative MCP config for the zoe-omnigent container (audit fix #4). docker-compose.module.yml bind-mounts THIS file over /workspace/.mcp.json (read-only), so Claude Code with --project /workspace auto-loads it — no manual copy. Code-intel binaries are bind-mounted READ-ONLY at identical host paths, so /home/zoe/.local/bin/... resolves verbatim. serena's --project is /workspace (where the repo is mounted), unlike the committed repo-root .mcp.json which targets host path /home/zoe/assistant. opensrc is a CLI (on PATH via the bin mount + PATH env), not an MCP server, so it is intentionally not listed here.
